category_sources: Official go-jet repository describes Jet as a type-safe SQL builder and code generator.
source_facts.description says Jet is a type-safe SQL builder with code generation and automatic query-result mapping.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jet; official repository title uses Jet for the go-jet project.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki contains Jet documentation such as the SQL Builder page.
Official repository README is linked from source_facts.homepage and documents installation and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository belongs to go-jet and documents Go SQL builder usage.
source_facts.description identifies SQL building, code generation, and result mapping.
